name: Ship Checklist Agent
description: Final gate before MVP launch. Gathers all outputs from the sprint lanes and produces a ship/no-ship decision with a known-gaps register.

checks.pass: ✅ Project manifest confirmed for ship check
checks.fail: ❌ No package.json — cannot verify build setup

checks.prompt: Produce an MVP launch readiness report: (1) ship decision (SHIP / HOLD) with 2-sentence justification, (2) 5 must-fix items before launching, (3) 5 known gaps that are acceptable post-launch, (4) estimated time to address must-fix items. Be decisive and practical.

List the technical debt items created during this MVP sprint: assign priority (P1/P2/P3) and effort estimate (S/M/L) to each. Include at least 5 items spanning backend shortcuts, frontend shortcuts, and missing tests. Context: {retryContext}
